story.text:
# ✨ The Symphony Within
**spell** · shared · narrative

Before the mage can cast outward, they must find harmony within. I scatter to become sky. I separate to stay whole. I promise to receive. I protect to carry forward.
> *Whispers of raindrops, roars of thunder, glimmers of focused light, must first find symphony within.*
